markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 16.7. REGISTRATION AND LICENSING OF BICYCLES [39000 - 39011]
##### § 39011

No fine imposed for any violation of an ordinance or resolution, which is adopted pursuant to this division, shall exceed ten dollars ($10).

*(Amended by Stats. 1983, Ch. 1092, Sec. 400. Effective September 27, 1983. Operative January 1, 1984, by Sec. 427 of Ch. 1092.)*

subsections.text: No fine imposed for any violation of an ordinance or resolution, which is adopted pursuant to this division, shall exceed ten dollars ($10).
